title: Lotononis harveyi
taxonomy: Lotononis harveyi is a species within the genus Lotononis, which belongs to the family Fabaceae. This classification makes it a member of the legume family, which includes a wide range of flowering plants. Lotononis harveyi is often characterized as a shrub or small tree, and is native to the southern regions of Africa. The genus Lotononis is typically found in arid and semi-arid areas, and is known for its ability to thrive in environments with limited water availability. Lotononis harveyi's classification within the Fabaceae family reflects its shared characteristics with other legumes, including its ability to fix nitrogen in the soil.
